sidebar.style: w-64 fixed h-screen bg-[#2E3192] text-white flex flex-col border-r border-[#202266]
sidebar.nav_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#202266] transition-colors rounded-md mx-2
sidebar.nav_item_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium bg-[#202266] text-white border-l-4 border-[#FF9933] rounded-r-md mx-2 ml-0

header.style: h-16 ml-64 bg-white border-b border-[#E5E7EB] flex items-center justify-between px-6 sticky top-0 z-40

cards.base: bg-white border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-md p-6 shadow-sm
cards.stat_card: flex flex-col gap-2 bg-white border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-md p-5 shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform

tables.container: w-full border border-[#E5E7EB] rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-white
tables.header_cell: px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-bold text-[#4B5563] uppercase tracking-wider

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#2E3192] hover:bg-[#202266] text-white text-sm font-semibold py-2 px-4 rounded-md transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2E3192] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-white border border-[#D1D5DB] hover:bg-[#F9FAFB] text-[#4B5563] text-sm font-medium py-2 px-4 rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.accent_saffron: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#FF9933] hover:bg-[#E68A2E] text-white text-sm font-semibold py-2 px-4 rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.danger: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#DC2626] hover:bg-[#B91C1C] text-white text-sm font-semibold py-2 px-4 rounded-md transition-colors

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold

inputs.base: w-full border border-[#D1D5DB] rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2E3192] focus:border-transparent bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] placeholder-[#9CA3AF]

stepper.container: flex items-center justify-between w-full mb-8 relative
stepper.step_active: flex flex-col items-center gap-2 relative z-10 text-[#2E3192]
stepper.step_inactive: flex flex-col items-center gap-2 relative z-10 text-[#9CA3AF]
stepper.circle_active: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-[#2E3192] text-white flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-sm border-4 border-white shadow-sm
stepper.circle_inactive: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white text-[#9CA3AF] flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-sm border-2 border-[#E5E7EB]
stepper.line: absolute top-5 left-0 w-full h-0.5 bg-[#E5E7EB] -z-0
stepper.line_active: absolute top-5 left-0 h-0.5 bg-[#2E3192] -z-0 transition-all duration-300

police_officer_portrait_1.description: Used as a placeholder photo for police staff in the data table or ID card mockups

police_officer_portrait_2.description: Used as a secondary placeholder photo for police staff

auth_background.description: Abstract/building background for the login screen or auth layout

design_system_rules: Dense dashboard format: Ensure tables can fit many rows on screen. Limit padding inside table cells to px-4 py-2 or py-3.
Form inputs must have clear, permanently visible labels (no floating labels).
Primary CTA (e.g., 'Deploy', 'Next Step') should be placed on the bottom right of modals or wizards.
Avoid glassmorphism. This is a government admin app; prioritize sharp readability and solid, high-contrast surfaces.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs).
Tabs in Staff Management must look like distinct folder tabs or pill-shaped segmented controls, not just underlined text.
Use a stepper component for the 5-Step Bandobast wizard to clearly communicate progress.
Implement clear visual hierarchies for map points and QR codes.
instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Chivo' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Import via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Implement standard shadcn/ui components (Tables, Dialogs, Select, Tabs, Calendar) and customize them to use the defined colors, primarily #2E3192 (Navy) for the active state.
For the Bandobast Wizard, create a state-driven multi-step form utilizing the stepper classes defined in the guidelines.
Ensure responsiveness, but prioritize desktop views (lg and xl) as this is an enterprise admin dashboard.

Mock the map view using a placeholder container or a lightweight map library like 'react-simple-maps' or a static image if interactive maps are out of scope, but UI should imply Google Maps integration.
Bilingual support can be mocked by showing labels like 'Dashboard / डॅशबोर्ड' or just providing an English UI with a note for Marathi localization structure.
